tickets.title: Question: Top full-length video by net subscribers gained and by views gained (rolling 1mo & 3mo)
tickets.summary: Top full-length video by net subs & by views over rolling 30d/90d (anchor 2026-07-04, BigQuery-only). 'Claude Code vs Manual Jira Ticket Work' won 3 of 4 cells (1mo subs: 'Why Gartner...' +17). Grain-clean, winners independently re-derived; /review = APPROVE.
